label: Scatter ruins simple
description: Scatters procedurally generated ruined structures of varying sizes across the map.

ruinSizeChanceCurve.label: Ruin size chance curve
ruinSizeChanceCurve.description: SimpleCurve mapping room count to relative probability. Controls the distribution of ruin sizes.

destroyChanceExp.label: Destroy chance exponent
destroyChanceExp.description: Exponent controlling how aggressively generated ruin structures are damaged.

usedRectsPadding.label: Used rects padding
usedRectsPadding.description: Number of cells by which used rects are expanded when checking for overlap with ruin placement.

clearSurroundingArea.label: Clear surrounding area
clearSurroundingArea.description: Private field. When true, natural rock edifices adjacent to ruin walls are destroyed during placement.

mustBeStandable.label: Must be standable
mustBeStandable.description: Private field. When true, the candidate scatter cell must be standable.

canBeOnEdge.label: Can be on edge
canBeOnEdge.description: Private field. When true, ruins may be placed at map edge cells.

ignoreUsedRects.label: Ignore used rects
ignoreUsedRects.description: Private field. When true, ruins are placed without checking or registering used rects.
